scripts.betterzeriya:build: bun run --cwd packages/client build && bun run --cwd apps/betterzeriya build && NODE=1 bun run --cwd apps/betterzeriya-server build
scripts.betterzeriya:build:node: bun run --cwd packages/client build && NODE=1 bun run --cwd apps/betterzeriya build && NODE=1 bun run --cwd apps/betterzeriya-server build
scripts.betterzeriya:build:vercel: bun run --cwd packages/client build && cd apps/betterzeriya && VERCEL=1 bun run build && mkdir -p ../../.vercel && rm -rf ../../.vercel/output && cp -R .vercel/output ../../.vercel/output
